openHouses.description: Open House ~ Come take a look!!! One of the largest homes and largest lots in the neighborhood, the property offers a rare combination of space, privacy, and convenience that is increasingly difficult to find at this price point!!

Beautiful End Unit Townhouse in Old Farm Lake. Spacious LR w/WBF + Cath Ceilings. Open Floor Plan w/LR/DR combo and sgd to Deck. EIK w/Marble counters + SS Appliances. Second Flr includes spacious Primary Bed Ste w/W-I closet & Updated Primary Bath. Add'l BD Ensuite w/Bath and Laundry Area. Complex has Pool, Tennis, Clubhouse, Paddle/Basketball Court and Playground. Convenient to all!. Easy NYC Commute. THIS HOME IS NOT TO BE MISSED!

openHouses.description: INCOMPARABLE VALUE! Listed $350K below the new 2026 Mamaroneck assessed value, there is plenty of room to update this house to your taste. This stone-front Ranch also features a wonderful lower level with a family room and private bedroom/bath suite. There are over 3,300SF of space on a half-acre maturely landscaped property that borders the Leather Stocking Trail. Make plans to view this solidly built home in one of Larchmont's prime locations.
